extName.description: Extension name shown in Chrome and on the Web Store.

extDescription.message: Watches your Claude.ai usage and pings you with a native OS notification the moment your message limit resets.
extDescription.description: Extension description shown in Chrome and on the Web Store.

popupSubtitle.message: We'll ping you the moment your quota refills.

statusIdle.description: Status when no alarm is set.

statusArmed.description: Status when an alarm is active.

statusWatching.description: Status-card title when no alarm is set and the countdown shows the usage reset time.

statusReady.description: Status title (green) when the countdown hit zero and no new window has started.

statusNoData.description: Placeholder when there is neither an alarm nor usage data.

usageSectionTitle.description: Heading for the usage progress-bar section.

btnTest.description: Tooltip on the bell icon next to the subtitle.

testSentHint.message: Sent. Nothing shown? Check the OS notification permission for Chrome.
testSentHint.description: Subtitle feedback after a test notification was sent.

testDeniedHint.message: Chrome has blocked notifications for this extension.
testDeniedHint.description: Shown when Chrome-level notification permission is denied.

testFailedHint.description: Shown when the test notification could not be triggered.

usageNotLoggedIn.message: Sign in to claude.ai in this browser to see your usage.

usageError.message: Couldn't load usage data. Is claude.ai reachable?

usageEmpty.message: No active limits reported. You are good to go.

limitModelWeekly.description: Label for a per-model weekly limit.

usageUpdatedAt.description: Footer of the usage card showing the last refresh time.

usageStaleAt.description: Shown when the refresh failed and a cached snapshot is displayed.

usageErrorNetwork.message: Network unavailable or claude.ai is unreachable.

windowsIdle.message: Send a message now to start a new 5-hour window.
windowsIdle.description: Guidance shown when quota is available and no window is active.
